enemizer-v4.description:
- Fixes EnemizerCLI's RandomizeTileTrapFloorTile function, normally unused in Archipelago, being forced on.
- Fix water enemy filtering for non-water shutter rooms

Note that it appears that alttp.apworld in `/custom_worlds/` is ignored if the alttp folder is still in `/lib/worlds/` - you will need to remove it (keep a backup!) for generation.
enemizer-v4.title: ALTTP: We Have Enemizer at Home v4
